subject: RE:
body:
Perfect, my father is in Florence now ; we all fly on Sunday to Tanzania for 6 days with my daughters.

I believe that the American Ambassador will go back to the US in a few months after the elections , even if President Obama wins. Maybe you want to ask him about the letter for the Interallie before his departure?
body_html:
Perfect, my father is in Florence now ; we all fly on Sunday to Tanzania for 6 days with my daughters.

subject: RE:
body:
due to hurrricane , i will not come until december. lets organize a call with your father, or if he likes i am happhy to fly mom and dad to new york . in a couple of weeks when hurrican isssues subside.
